title: Office managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image or raise issue awareness for their organization or client. Plan, direct, or coordinate activities to solicit and maintain funds for special projects or nonprofit organizations. Plan, direct, or coordinate one or more administrative services of an organization, such as records and information management, mail distribution, and other office support services. (Based on 31 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Attend meetings, conventions, and civic events to promote services, seek financing, and maintain community alliances.
Preserve records, documents, and objects, copying them to necessary formats for easy access.
Organize archival records and develop classification systems to facilitate access to materials and ensure proper record-keeping.
Train and supervise staff, including curatorial and clerical personnel, to enhance operational efficiency.
Plan and conduct educational programs and outreach activities, such as tours and workshops, to engage the public.
Develop and maintain an institution's registration, cataloging, and record-keeping systems using suitable technologies.
Negotiate and authorize the purchase, exchange, or loan of collections, ensuring legal compliance and ethical standard adherence.
Inspect premises to assess repair needs and ensure compliance with quality and safety standards.
Coordinate the acquisition, storage, and exhibition of collections, including the planning of thematic exhibits.
Review operational reports and logs to ensure adequate production levels and compliance with standards.
Develop budgets and strategic plans, confer with the board, and manage resources to meet organizational goals.
Authenticate, appraise, and study historical documents and materials to determine their significance and value.
Develop policies and guidelines regarding public access to materials and the use of institutional resources.
Create and review publicity materials and grant proposals to support fundraising and awareness initiatives.
Communicate regularly with staff and external entities to ensure effective operations and nurture community relations.
Set goals and deadlines for the department.
Analyze and evaluate security operations to identify risks or opportunities for improvement through auditing or assessment.
Assess risks to mitigate potential consequences of incidents and develop a response plan.
Attend meetings and seminars to keep abreast of changes in legislative directives or technologies impacting operations.
Prepare and manage budgets for various operations or departments, ensuring efficient use of resources.
Review and approve specifications for issuing and awarding bids and contracts.
Organize and supervise activities related to mail processing and distribution, including incoming and outgoing mail.
Direct and coordinate activities of personnel engaged in buying, selling, and distributing materials, equipment, and supplies.
Hire, train, and evaluate employees, and prepare work schedules and performance assessments.
Negotiate contracts and resolve disputes with vendors, suppliers, or clients.
Communicate and enforce policies and procedures, ensuring compliance among staff and addressing performance issues.
Supervise office and administrative employees to ensure adherence to quality standards, deadlines, and proper procedures.
Prepare and maintain reports regarding operational activities, performance, and quality standards.
Coordinate office services such as equipment acquisition, disposal of assets, and maintenance activities.
Resolve customer complaints and answer inquiries regarding policies and procedures.
Negotiate prices and terms with suppliers, vendors, or freight forwarders, and negotiate with carriers for services and rates.
Document supply chain processes, define performance metrics for evaluation, and analyze supplier performance or procurement programs.
Develop or implement procedures for supplier evaluation, logistics integration, and supply chain management.
Examine invoices and shipping manifests for regulatory compliance and plan or implement energy-saving transportation changes.
Develop fundraising strategies, establish goals for soliciting funds, and manage fundraising budgets and activities.
Plan and direct special events for fundraising, and contact corporate representatives to increase awareness of organizational activities.
Compile materials for funding organizations and maintain effective relationships with clients, government officials, and media representatives.
Write press releases and prepare media kits to promote the organization or public relations efforts.
Supervise or hire staff for fundraising activities, plan programs of events, and assign tasks to ensure effective operations.
Evaluate advertising and promotion programs for compatibility with fundraising and public relations efforts.
Review or evaluate proposals or bids to make recommendations regarding awarding of contracts.
Lead or support negotiations involving tax agreements, power purchase agreements, or land use agreements.
Manage site assessments or environmental studies for projects and prepare requests for proposals (RFPs) for construction or equipment.
Coordinate or conduct internal investigations of employee theft and ensure compliance with corporate loss prevention policies.
Conduct periodic internal reviews or audits to ensure compliance procedures are followed and prepare management reports regarding compliance operations.
Provide employee training on compliance related topics and disseminate written policies and procedures related to compliance activities.
Advise management or business partners on the implementation of compliance programs and communicate regulatory information to departments.
Maintain documentation of compliance activities, such as complaints received, investigation outcomes, and monitor compliance systems to ensure effectiveness.
Review and negotiate contracts for services or materials needed for environmental projects and monitor regulatory affairs activities to ensure alignment with sustainability initiatives.
Organize and oversee events such as organized runs or walks and develop or coordinate fitness and wellness programs or services.
